resources.string: No media session is being bridged
Bridging media session to Android Auto

This app bridges media apps (YouTube, Podcasts, etc.) that don't support Android Auto natively.

1) Grant Notification Access to this app.
2) Play media in any app.
3) Open Android Auto (Developer Mode + Unknown Sources must be enabled).
4) The "AA Media Proxy" media widget will appear.

Note: apps that already support Android Auto (such as Spotify, YouTube Music) are skipped to avoid duplicate widgets.
Play media in any app to see it appear here
